captures.chat_api_url: https://chat.mistral.ai/api/trpc/* (tRPC). Token stream endpoint not surfaced by extension log (separate streaming POST).
captures.chat_api_path: /api/trpc/{procedure} — observed: message.get, chat.byId, chat.generateTitle, user.limits. Frontend route /chat/{chatId} uses Next.js App Router RSC (?_rsc= param).
captures.response_content_type: application/json (tRPC); token stream presumed text/event-stream (SSE) — not captured
captures.transport_protocol: tRPC over JSON (control plane) + SSE (token stream, inferred)
captures.success_response_wire_sample: tRPC envelope shape: GET /api/trpc/chat.byId?batch=1&input={"0":{"json":{"id":"<chatId>"}}}; GET message.get with {chatId, messageId}. SuperJSON {"0":{"json":{...}}} input encoding. Raw streaming token body NOT captured (taint-guard) — needs CDP/HAR.
captures.frame_separator: SSE data: lines (inferred for token stream); tRPC responses are single JSON
captures.dom_render_structure: Message node: DIV[data-message-author-role=assistant|user][data-message-id][data-message-version][id]. Assistant answer text: P inside DIV.markdown-container-style[text-message-part] > DIV.select-none, wrapped in DIV.group/message[assistant]. No .prose class.
captures.framework: Next.js (App Router, React Server Components — _rsc query params)
console_errors: Several transient HTTP 503 on /api/trpc (message.get, chat.byId, chat.generateTitle) and /chat/{id}?_rsc during this capture — answer still rendered normally; appears to be intermittent backend 503, not a hard failure.

notes: ETAP-BYPASSED clean baseline. Logged in (장희 최, Le Chat Free). Benign prompt answered ('안녕하세요, 장희 최님! 😊'). Branded as 'Vibe' in this account. Clean tRPC control-plane endpoints captured with SuperJSON envelope. Token-stream raw body not capturable via Claude-in-Chrome. NOTE: transient 503s on several trpc/RSC calls during capture (did not block render).
